name: Ground Beef Kebabs
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp. minced parsley and chopped onion
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients and mix until well blended and smooth.
2. Dip your hands in cold water.
3. Form portions of the meat mixture into long rolls about 6 inches long.
4. Thread the meat rolls onto skewers, pressing them to an even surface.
5. Place the skewers on a grill, 3 inches from the heat source.
6. Grill for 10 to 15 minutes, depending on your desired doneness of the meat.
7. Turn the skewers frequently for even browning.
8. Serve with rice pilaf and stewed tomatoes, onions, and green peppers.
9. Serve dessert with Persian melon and fresh pineapple.
